item.title: A Music Festival Moment for These Kids
item.description: A look at an incident involving young attendees at a music festival and the events that unfolded, presented with context and available details.

item.title: LordanArts: A Friendship Tested by Money
item.description: A story about a friendship strained by a disagreement involving money, exploring how trust and relationships were affected.

media:content.media:description: A story about a friendship strained by a disagreement involving money, exploring how trust and relationships were affected.

item.title: A Close Call Caught on Camera
item.description: A factual review of an incident, examining the timeline, known details, and circumstances surrounding the event.

item.title: LordanArts: A Long Investigation Unfolds
item.description: A detailed investigation highlights how police spent months tracking a suspect and years working to confirm his identity, bringing clarity to a complex case.

media:content.media:title: LordanArts: A Long Investigation Unfolds
media:content.media:description: A detailed investigation highlights how police spent months tracking a suspect and years working to confirm his identity, bringing clarity to a complex case.
